title: 10 Soothing Herbal Teas for Oily Face and Acne Prone Skin
description: Aloe barbadensis tea is a great remedy for oily skin. It helps to balance the skin's natural oil production, reducing the appearance of pores and making the skin look smoother. The antioxidants in aloe vera tea help to fight off bacteria and other impurities that can clog pores and cause acne. It also has anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation. The tea's natural astringent properties help to tighten the skin, which can help to minimi...
